title: cordia dwyeri
intro: Cordia dwyeri, also known as the Cordia tree or Wild Apricot, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cordia dwyeri include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and providing relief from gastrointestinal problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
